signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.raw:
Panel rules NFL teams didn't collude on QB deals | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A neutral arbitration panel has officially ruled that NFL teams did not collude on quarterback contracts, resolving recent allegations and providing league-wide clarity on free agency practices.[1][4]
